query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026 is:

**3,138,394 acres** (with 35,884 year-to-date wildfires)

**Date:** From the NIFC National Fire News report dated **June 30, 2026**, reflecting data "as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT," sourced from the NICC Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR).

This figure was cross-validated across two separate NIFC pages (National Fire News and the Statistics page), both showing the identical YTD total and both citing the IMSR as the source. As the report updates Monday–Friday during fire season, this June 30 report is the latest available as of late June 2026.

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Report dated June 30, 2026, as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT. Year-to-date fires: 35,884; acres burned: 3,138,394.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Year-to-date Acres Burned: 3,138,394 Acres; Year-to-date Wildfires: 35,884 Incidents; 54 large fires being suppressed; 474,026 acres burned on large fires; 8,261 personnel assigned.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report - Monday June 29, 2026 - 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: Underlying IMSR source for NIFC year-to-date statistics.

key_facts: NIFC YTD acres burned for 2026: 3,138,394 acres, as of June 29, 2026 (report dated June 30, 2026).
NIFC YTD wildfires for 2026: 35,884 incidents, as of June 29, 2026.
Data is sourced from the Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) published by NICC, 'as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT.'
Same-day operational context: 8 new large fires, 54 uncontained large fires being suppressed, 474,026 acres burned on large fires, 8,261 personnel assigned.
The identical 3,138,394-acre figure was confirmed on two separate NIFC pages (National Fire News and Statistics), both citing the IMSR.
NIFC National Fire News updates Monday through Friday during fire season; the June 30, 2026 report is the latest available as of late June 2026.
